3320510.name: Lines of Balls
3320510.description:
The goal of the game is to prevent the balls from filling all the empty cells. To do this, collect balls of the same color in rows. As soon as there are five or more in a row, they disappear and you get points. The more balls in a line, the more points you get. In the game, you can undo the last move, save and load the game. You can customize the background and choose the type of ball.

By purchasing the game, you will get the opportunity to play an exciting logical game with balls. You will also be able to save your game, change the background and the type of balls.
3320510.supported_languages:
英语*, 俄语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
